title: AlphaFold科学家John Jumper离开Google DeepMind加入Anthropic
full_text:
Rohan Paul on X: "John Jumper, the AlphaFold scientist who shared a Nobel Prize with Demis Hassabis, is leaving Google DeepMind for Anthropic after nearly 9 years at the lab.
Jumper is best known for spearheading Google's AlphaFold team.
Just yesterday, Google also lost Noam Shazeer, a Gemini https://t.co/qGGXRZAuFI" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Rohan Paul
@rohanpaul_ai
John Jumper, the AlphaFold scientist who shared a Nobel Prize with Demis Hassabis, is leaving Google DeepMind for Anthropic after nearly 9 years at the lab.
Jumper is best known for spearheading Google's AlphaFold team.
Just yesterday, Google also lost Noam Shazeer, a Gemini co-lead, Character .AI founder, and co-author of "Attention Is All You Need", to OpenAI.
John Jumper
@JohnJumperSci
13h
A bit of news: After nearly 9 years, I have decided to leave Google DeepMind and join Anthropic (after taking some time to recharge). I am incredibly grateful for my time at GDM. @ demishassabis took a real chance letting me lead the AlphaFold team just six months after finishing Show more
7:06 PM · Jun 19, 2026 9K Views
